item.title: 介绍有教育意义的答案 | Introducing Educative Answers
item.description:
教育的存在是为了让每个开发人员更有效率和更成功——这实际上是我们的使命宣言。

这个使命是由人来完成的。 当软件工程师变得富有成效并取得成功时，Educative 就做对了一些事情。

为了完成这一使命，我们在 Educative 博客、 CodingInterview.com上提供免费内容，以深入了解大公司的招聘流程，并在不断发展的 Python 世界中提供Grokking Python内容。 我们提供的产品包括 300 多门课程、50 多个项目、关键职业技能的路径以及个性化计划，以便在您需要时获得所需。

现在我们为全球开发者社区提供完全免费的资源， Educative Answers 。

正确答案，每一次

由全球贡献者社区提供支持，每个答案都由教育技术工程师审查准确性，并通过我们的编辑流程以确保清晰。 这意味着您每次都会得到正确的答案。

作为一名前开发人员，我知道在谷歌上搜索答案、从过时的文档或在线社区中的其他工程师中复制一些参考代码，然后在我的 IDE 中对其进行调整，却发现它不起作用是什么感觉。 我也知道在论坛中挖掘一个问题的三个不同答案是什么感觉。

开发人员希望互相帮助。 社交网络、论坛和 Slack 频道——到处都是提问的人和其他提供答案的工程师。 但有时正确的答案会被埋没。 有时甚至没有提出正确的问题，但是当您提出问题时，没有人回答-迷失在互联网的信息洪流中。

教育性答案消除了这些障碍。 您提出一个问题，来自世界各地的数百名开发人员和技术内容工程师齐聚一堂，为您提供一个答案。 而且您会知道它可以工作，因为每个 Answer在浏览器中都有可执行代码。

教育的支柱，开发人员的资源

最初是一个社区项目，现在已成为 Educative 服务产品的支柱。 当您来到教育领域时，课程将引导您掌握一项关键技能，项目将帮助您将所有学习内容整合到完全实现的应用程序中，而评估可以帮助您衡量您的技能水平并确定需要改进的领域。

当您上班时， Educative Enterprise使工程经理能够快速入职新员工，并通过个性化计划打破部落知识孤岛，让开发人员能够快速提升技能。 这是工程师的工程支持，而不是通过特定的平台。

当您有一个需要解决的快速问题时，Educative Answers 每次都会从您知道您可以信任的来源为您提供正确的答案。

加入社区

有工程问题？ 查看新的教育性答案。 想帮助其他开发者？ 成为贡献者，在全球范围内提供您值得信赖的专业知识。

开始讨论

这篇文章有帮助吗？ 在下面的评论中让我们知道！



原文:

Educative exists to make every developer more productive and more successful - it's literally our mission statement.

This mission is fulfilled in and by people. When software engineers become productive and successful, Educative has done something right.

To fulfill this mission, we offer free content at the Educative blog, CodingInterview.com for insights on the hiring process at major companies, and Grokking Python for the constantly evolving world of Python. Our product offerings include over 300 Courses, more than 50 Projects, Paths for key career skills, and Personalized Plans to cut the fluff and get what you need when you want it.

And now we offer Educative Answers, a completely free resource for and by the global developer community.

The Right Answer, Every Time

Educative Answers is the premier destination for software engineers looking for reference code and quick knowledge in a wide array of programming languages. Powered by a global community of contributors, every Answer is reviewed by Educative technical engineers for accuracy and passes through our editorial process to ensure clarity. This means that you'll get the right Answer every time.

As a former developer, I know what it’s like to google an answer, copy some reference code from outdated documentation or another engineer in an online community, and then tweak it in my IDE only to find it doesn’t quite work. I also know what it’s like to dig through forums to find three different answers to one question.

Developers want to help each other. Social networks, forums, and Slack channels - they’re filled with people asking questions and other engineers providing answers. But sometimes the right answer gets buried. Sometimes the right question hasn’t even been asked, but when you ask it, no one answers - lost in the flood of information that is the internet.

Educative Answers eliminates these roadblocks. You come with a question, and hundreds of developers and technical content engineers from around the world come together to provide you with one Answer. And you’ll know it can work because every Answer has executable code right in the browser.

A Pillar for Educative, The Resource for Developers

What started as a community project is now a pillar in Educative’s service offering. Educative Answers serves over 2 million users per month, empowering engineers to solve problems and advance their projects quickly.

When you come to Educative, Courses will walk you through mastering a key skill, Projects will help you put all your learning together in fully-realized applications, and Assessments can help you benchmark your skill level and identify areas for improvement.

When you go to work, Educative Enterprise empowers engineering managers to quickly onboard new hires and frees developers to upskill quickly by breaking down silos of tribal knowledge through personalized plans. It’s engineering enablement for and by engineers, not through specific platforms.

And when you have a quick question that needs to be solved, Educative Answers gets you the right answer every time from a source you know you can trust.

Join the Community

Have an engineering problem? Check out the new Educative Answers. Want to help other developers? Become a contributor to provide your trusted expertise on a global scale.

Start a discussion

Does Educative Answers sound like a helpful tool for your dev journey? Was this post helpful? Let us know in the comments below!
item.author: huntereducative

item.title: 过度工程的艺术 | The Art of Over Engineering
item.description:
这个博客最初是在这里写的👈🏼

简单的答案是给傻逼的……

是我在构建一个完全不必要的工具时一直对自己说的话，我会用它来进行这种开创性的新交流形式......博客！ 从来没有听说过他们。

为什么？

我想……探索一些我完全不熟悉的东西，并想有什么比为自己构建一个定制的博客工具并写下使用该工具的整个体验更好的方法来实现它。 读者和我的双赢。 他们得到了辛辣的内容，我得到了我在 DM 中犯的每一个“错误”的“解决方案”。

我们学到了什么？

通过WRY和TAO的全能 Webview 的强大功能，我的 Tauri 应用程序击败了基于电子的类似应用程序的中断……理论上，当涉及到几乎所有可数指标时。 等一下，我必须打破我的放大镜🔎

你的大脑阅读这句话所花费的精力比这个全速运行的应用程序要多。

几乎忘了给每个人他们的粮食🧂，我以每小时一百万英里的速度飞行，像筛子一样泄露细节，就像你自己做的研究一样。

锁定它

我要抽出所有的node.env === development{ let me have ALL of the spicy DB commands }

最终，我将添加从应用程序中删除帖子的功能，真正隔离来自{bigShadyTechCompany.name}的所有辛辣变量和 API 调用，当我向大家展示你......是的，你可以使用 11ty 来打发时间并且没有自从试图获得我死亡的钥匙后就停止了。 但是编辑呢！？！

我不做薄饼，继续前进。

如果合适就发货

我能够将我的 Slate.js 实例批发到我的应用程序中，就像 Skyrim 的 10 周年纪念版一样……是的，十年来运行所有的 mods……

但是扎克！ 这完全行不通，你想搞什么骗局？

这应该是我赞扬你的观察技巧并完全同意你的部分，但它的现实是在一些小的路线futting之后你不知道SOB编译的。 阅读文档确实有效！

现在这只能让我们走到终点线的一半，是时候看看 Supabase 是否会与其他两个人打得很好。 我基本上把我重构的东西带到了 React 中，并让一个短篇故事变得更短。

这说明了 Supabases 出色的 DX 和 Tauris 能够将大多数 FE 成分变成适合任何计算机口味的膳食。 带回家

在构建这个时，我已经准备好用英雄的故事从堆栈中打出一百万行，只使用 CLI 提示，现实……无论是更无聊的一个 IMO是一个非常线性的构建过程，休息并重复，直到我完成。

最后，我留下了一种干净、简单和安全的方式来向大众传达我的信息……所有人都欢呼催眠博主，并在此过程中学到了很多东西。

哇，那是很多话，很高兴你来到这里，谢谢你闲逛👋🏼

家政

这一切都可以由一个简单的“npm run dev”处理吗？

呃。

有人应该走这条路吗？

也许不是这个确切的，但要理解这一切的更深层次的意义，然后继续下去。

这一切的意义何在？

讲故事可以帮助我更好地学习，而技术性的思考作品往往很无聊。

冷静下来…

你有推特吗？

有点跑题了，你不觉得……但我有



原文:

This blog was originally written here 👈🏼

simple answers are for the suckers...

Is what I kept saying to myself while building out a ..totally unnecessary tool I would use to do this groundbreaking new form of communication... Blogging!! ..hmm what's that? dev.to?? never heard of em.

For why?

I wanted to… explore something I was wholly unfamiliar with and thought what better way to accomplish that than building a bespoke blogging tool for myself and write about the whole experience using that tool. A win win for the reader and me. They get spicy content , I get “solutions” to every “mistake” I make in my DMs.

…everyone learns!

The 3 Amigos

Tauri - The spicy Electron competitor that allows me to build this program in almost any FE framework I want strapped with a Rust backend, capable of producing lightweight fully compatible versions for all OSs …even those who have a strange fascination with penguins.

Slate.js - A React based framework for building a rich text editor that lets me cherry pick whatever features I want packaged together in reusable components. …Like a digital Lego set but for writing

Supabase - An open source database …and much much more provider capable of storing all the 1s and 0s responsible for what you’re reading now, and giving me an easy way to go an get them.

What did we learn?

That with the power of the almighty Webview via WRY and TAO my Tauri app beats the breaks off of a similar app built on electron …in theory when it comes to just about every countable metric. …I counted at least to 6

hold on I have to break out my magnifying glass 🔎

The energy it took your brain to read this sentence cost more than this app running at full tilt.

Almost forgot to give everyone their grain of 🧂, I am flying by stuff at a million miles an hour and leaking details like a sieve as always do your own research.

Locking it down

I get to yank out all of the node.env === development{ let me have ALL of the spicy DB commands }

bs out of the blogs repo and shove all of the API logic centered around posting to the DB into the apps repo.

Next.js does a great job hiding variables but good luck untangling the Rust compiled spaghetti binary and for those that can …Gather round everyone, on the count of three..

Eventually I will add the ability to delete posts from the app truly isolating all of the spicy variables and API calls from {bigShadyTechCompany.name} who got pissed at me when I showed everyone that you …yes you can bend time using 11ty and have not stopped since trying to obtain the keys to my demise. …but in the mean time SEO score go BrtTtTtTtTt

but what about editing!?!

I dont make mistcakes, moving on.

If it fits it ships

I was able to cram my Slate.js instance wholesale into my app and like the 10th anniversary edition of Skyrim …yup a decade running all the mods…

but Zach! that would totally not work, what kind of scam are you trying to pull?

This should be the part where I commend you on your observation skills and agree with you fully but the reality of it is after some minor route futzing wouldn’t you know it that S.O.B compiled. …I was as surprised as everyone else.

…Breaking News! Reading documentation actually works!

Now that only gets us halfway to the finish line and it is time to see if Supabase would play nice with the other two. I essentially took what I had refactored it to React and to make a short story even shorter it fit..

This speaks to Supabases excellent DX and Tauris ability to turn most FE ingredients into a meal fit for any computers palate. …Blog Bourgogne!

Bring it home

While building this one out I was ready to have heroic stories of fighting my way out of a stack trace a million lines deep using nothing but CLI prompts, the reality …all be it a much more boring one IMO was a pretty linear process of build, break and repeat until I was done.

In the end I am left with a clean, easy and safe way to get my message out to the masses …all hail hypno-blogger and learned a bunch along the way.

Woo that was a lot of words glad ya made it down here, thanks for hanging out 👋🏼

Housekeeping

Could this have been all handled by a simple ‘npm run dev’ ?

Duh.

Should someone follow this path?

Maybe not this exact one but take the deeper meaning of it all and run with that.

What was the point of all this?

Telling a story helps me learn better and technical think pieces tend to be boring af.

What’s happening with the ole Zacharyp.dev 11ty swap??

Chill out…

Do you have a Twitter?

Kinda off topic don’t ya think… but I do
item.author: zacharyp

item.title: Windows 对软件开发来说并没有那么糟糕 | Windows is not that bad for software development
item.description:
穆罕默德·阿什拉夫·伊斯兰教

发表于今天它不是关于virtualbox/vmware。 这是 Windows 10 的一项新功能。 他们称之为 WSL（Linux 的 Windows 子系统）

最初发表于这里

什么是 WSL？

已经告诉Windows Subsystem for Linux 。 那么，他们是怎么做到的？ 这是一个紧迫的问题。 今天我不会那样做。 但我可以说的一件事是，他们稍微修改了内核以适应 Windows。 是不是很厉害？？ 是的！ 我真的很高兴分享它。

我们今天要介绍什么？

  • 先决条件
  • 启用 WSL。
  • 安装 Ubuntu（22.04 可能）。
  • 设置 WSL 资源。
  • 在 Ubuntu 上安装 Docker。
  • 先决条件

    您必须运行 Windows 10 版本 2004 及更高版本（内部版本 19041 及更高版本）或 Windows 11。

    要检查您的 Windows 版本和内部版本号，请选择Windows 徽标键 + R ，键入winver ，然后选择确定。

    启用 WSL

    您可以从 GUI 和 Powershell 启用。 我总是更喜欢硬方式（命令行）。 因此，在 Powershell 上运行以下命令。

     dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux /all /norestart

    启用虚拟化技术

    dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:VirtualMachinePlatform /all /norestart

    现在您需要重新启动机器。

    安装 WSL 更新

    从此处下载更新安装程序并运行安装程序。

    将 WSL2 设置为默认 WSL 版本。

     wsl --set-default-version 2

    更新现有发行版（如果有）

     wsl --set-version <distribution name> 2

    安装 Ubuntu (22.04)

    在 WSL 中安装操作系统有多种方法。 您可以从Windows Store下载。 这是无忧无虑的过程。 安装后，您将能够使用给定的密码登录。 不要害怕，没有用户界面。 只有像 Ubuntu Server 这样的命令行 :)

    现在再次打开 Powershell，

    你会得到类似以下的东西，

    设置 WSL 资源

    是的。 您仍然有机会修改您的资源分配。 否则，您的窗户将决定这样做。 这个过程非常简单。 您需要将文件创建到特定位置。 打开文件， 

 notepad "$env:USERPROFILE\.wslconfig"

将这些行添加到编辑器并保存。

 [wsl2] memory=4GB processors=4

您可以阅读microsoft 的文档了解更多配置。 现在使用 Powershell/CMD 再次登录到 ubuntu，无论你有什么 shell。

在 WSL(Ubuntu) 上安装 Docker

这不是强制性的。 因此，如果您不是 Docker 专家，请不要将自己推向 Docker。

安装 Docker 的指南与 ubuntu 相同。 你可以关注Docker 官方文档，也可以盲目关注我。 在 Ubuntu 的终端而不是 Powershell上运行以下命令。

  1. 更新 apt 包索引并安装包以允许 apt 通过 HTTPS 使用存储库：
 $ sudo apt update $ sudo apt install \ ca-certificates \ curl \ gnupg \ lsb-release
  1. 添加 Docker 的官方 GPG 密钥：
 $ sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings $ curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
  1. 使用以下命令设置存储库
$ echo \ "deb [arch= $( dpkg --print-architecture ) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \ $( lsb_release -cs ) stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null
 $ sudo apt update $ sudo apt install docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
  1. 启动docker并检查
$ sudo service docker start $ sudo service docker status
  1. 测试你的 docker 安装
$ sudo docker run hello-world

输出：

所以，Docker 正在工作。

万一来自 WSL 的任何网络问题

$ echo -e "[network]\ngenerateResolvConf = false" | sudo tee -a /etc/wsl.conf $ sudo unlink /etc/resolv.conf $ echo nameserver 1.1.1.1 | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf

我发现有些人有 iptables 相关的错误。 所以我推荐以下命令并选择 legacy

 $ update-alternatives --config iptables

设置 VSCode

实际上没有什么可设置的。 相信我，做以下事情，

  • 你只需要安装一个扩展。 你可以从这里得到它。
  • 在 WSL(ubuntu) 上创建项目
  • 在左下角，您将看到远程开发按钮。
  • 选择新的 WSL 窗口
  • 从 WSL(Ubuntu) 打开项目

现在都是你的了。

设置 Intellij IDE（在我的例子中是 Pycharm。）

  • 使用 Intellij IDE (Pycharm) 代码保留在 windows 机器上。
  • 分步指南在这里。

结论

我今天话太多了。 但这让我不得不这样做。 但是，我为什么要写这篇文章？

简而言之，7-8 年后我一直在尝试 Windows 10。我很高兴看到 WSL 以及它是如何工作的。 所以，我想人们也可能喜欢它。 谢谢你。

克里斯蒂安·海尔曼—— 一旦暂停，ashraful 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，ashraful 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，ashraful 发布的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ashraful 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Mohamad Ashraful Islam

Posted on Jul 1

Today it's not about virtualbox/vmware. It's a new Windows 10 feature. They called it WSL(Windows Subsystem for Linux)

Originally Posted on HERE

What is WSL?

Already told Windows Subsystem for Linux. Windows made sure to install Linux operating system inside the Windows environment without extra virtualization software(Virtual Box, VmWare, ...). So, How they did that?? That's burning question. Today I'll not go that way. But one thing I can tell that is, they slightly modified the kernel to fit with windows. Isn't it awesome?? YES! I am really exited to share about it.

What we are going to cover today?

  • Prerequisites
  • Enable WSL.
  • Install Ubuntu (22.04 Maybe).
  • Set WSL Resource.
  • Install Docker on Ubuntu.
  • VSCode WSL development.
  • Intellij IDE WSL development.

Prerequisites

You must be running Windows 10 version 2004 and higher (Build 19041 and higher) or Windows 11.

To check your Windows version and build number, select Windows logo key + R, type winver, select OK.

Enabling WSL

You can enable from GUI as well as from Powershell. I always prefer the hard way(command line). So, Run the following commands on Powershell.

dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux /all /norestart

Enabling the Virtualization Technology 

dism.exe /online /enable-feature /featurename:VirtualMachinePlatform /all /norestart

Now you need to restart the machine.

Install WSL Update

Downthe the update installer from here and Run the installer.

Set WSL2 as default WSL version. 

wsl --set-default-version 2

Update existing distribution (if any)

wsl --set-version <distribution name> 2

Install Ubuntu (22.04)

There are several ways to install the OS in WSL. You can download from the Windows Store. This is the hassel free process. Once installed you will be able to login using your given password. Don't afraid, there is no UI. Only command line like Ubuntu Server :)

Now open Powershell again,

You will get something like following,

Set WSL Resource

Yes. You can still have chance to modify your resource allocation. Otherwise your windows will decide to do so. The process is pretty simple. You need to create a file to a specific location. Open the file,

notepad "$env:USERPROFILE\.wslconfig"

Add these lines to the editor and save it.

[wsl2]
memory=4GB  
processors=4

You can read the microsoft's document for more configuration. Now login to the ubuntu again, with Powershell/CMD whatever shell you have.

Install Docker on WSL(Ubuntu)

It's not mandatory. So, don't push yourself into Docker if your are not a Docker guy.

Installing Docker is same guide as ubuntu. You can follow the official Docker docs OR blindly follow me. Run the following commands on the Ubuntu's terminal not Powershell.

  1. Update the apt package index and install packages to allow apt to use a repository over HTTPS: 
$ sudo apt update
$ sudo apt install \
   ca-certificates \
   curl \
   gnupg \
   lsb-release
  1. Add Docker’s official GPG key: 
$ sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
$ curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
  1. Use the following command to set up the repository 
$ echo \ "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \ $(lsb_release -cs) stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null

$ sudo apt update
$ sudo apt install docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
  1. Start the docker and check 
$ sudo service docker start
$ sudo service docker status
  1. Test your docker installation 
$ sudo docker run hello-world

Output:

So, Docker is working.

Incase any Network issue from WSL 

$ echo -e "[network]\ngenerateResolvConf = false" | sudo tee -a /etc/wsl.conf
$ sudo unlink /etc/resolv.conf
$ echo nameserver 1.1.1.1 | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf

IPTables related issues

I found some people have iptables related errors. So I recommend the following command and choose legacy

$ update-alternatives --config iptables

Setting up VSCode

Actually there is nothing to setup. Trust me and do the following things,

  • You just need to install an extension. You can get it from here.
  • Create a project on WSL(ubuntu)
  • On the bottom left corner you will see remote development button.
  • Select New WSL Window
  • Open the project from WSL(Ubuntu)

Now it's all yours.

Setting up Intellij IDE (Pycharm in my case.)

  • Using Intellij IDE (Pycharm) codes stays on the windows machine.
  • Interpreter(Environment) will be just shared from WSL. The step by step guide is here.

Conclusion

I've talked too much today. But it made me to do so. But, Why I am writing this post?

In short, After 7-8 years I have been trying windows 10. I am so pleased to see the WSL and how it works. So, I thought people may like it too. Thank you.

Christian Heilmann - May 27

Once suspended, ashraful will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ashraful will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ashraful will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ashraful is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
